creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
The issue with debugging is:

I am using devel/gcc, compiling openvpn-auth-ldap WITH_DEBUG=yes,
and then using the testplugin program.

I set a breakpoint on the initWithConfigFile: method, but GCC does not stop there. Perhaps this is wrong and I need to set the breakpoint on the newly alloc'd object, but I do not know how to do that.
